subject: HAWC-200814A: Retraction of burst alert
submitter: Hugo Ayala at Pennsylvania State University  <hgayala@psu.edu>
body:
The HAWC Collaboration (http://www.hawc-observatory.org/collaboration/)
reports:

After human inspection, the trigger HAWC-200814A
is no longer considered to be of astrophysical
origin due to a data quality issue in the detector.
